steps.title: Find the total growth
steps.content:
The plant grew an average of $1.15$ centimeters per day for $14$ days:
$$1.15(14)=16.1$$

steps.title: Subtract from the final height
steps.content:
The final height was $39.9$ centimeters, so the beginning height was:
$$39.9-16.1=23.8$$The answer is 23.8.
